prompt_text:
### Demographics: 69-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 14 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Cholelithiasis (status post cholecystectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger sister)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 10 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~2.5 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Glimepiride 2mg once daily

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 57.4 kg; Height 161.1 cm; BMI 22.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 122/65 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.7%; 9 months ago 10.5%; 6 months ago 10.0%; 3 months ago 9.5%; current 8.4%), FPG (12 months ago 310mg/dL; 9 months ago 265mg/dL; 6 months ago 247mg/dL; 3 months ago 214mg/dL; current 201mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 58.7kg; 9 months ago 57.8kg; 6 months ago 58.9kg; 3 months ago 59.9kg; current 57.4kg), Height (12 months ago 161.1cm; 9 months ago 161.1cm; 6 months ago 161.1cm; 3 months ago 161.1cm; current 161.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 23.0kg/m²; current 22.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 122mmHg; 9 months ago 121mmHg; 6 months ago 123mmHg; 3 months ago 123mmHg; current 122mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 65mmHg; 9 months ago 64mmHg; 6 months ago 65mmHg; 3 months ago 64mmHg; current 65mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 5U/L; 9 months ago 6U/L; 6 months ago 15U/L; 3 months ago 13U/L; current 11U/L), AST (12 months ago 24U/L; 9 months ago 30U/L; 6 months ago 25U/L; 3 months ago 32U/L; current 28U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.5mg/dL; current 0.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 103mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 100mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 103mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 98mL/min/1.73m²; current 100mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 59mg/g; 9 months ago 65mg/g; 6 months ago 85mg/g; 3 months ago 82mg/g; current 66mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 70mg/dL; 9 months ago 70mg/dL; 6 months ago 70mg/dL; 3 months ago 73mg/dL; current 71mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 53mg/dL; 9 months ago 53mg/dL; 6 months ago 51mg/dL; 3 months ago 51mg/dL; current 52mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 138mg/dL; 9 months ago 121mg/dL; 6 months ago 140mg/dL; 3 months ago 142mg/dL; current 131mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.9g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 12.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.29 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
